mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM medicine WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supplier WHERE status = 1
SELECT IFNULL(SUM( CASE WHEN expiry_date >= CURDATE() THEN (current_quantity - locked_quantity) ELSE 0 END ), 0) FROM inventory
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM warning_record WHERE status = 'OPEN'
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM purchase_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM sale_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
